title: test-artifact block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the test-artifact (image-validate) lego block after running validation commands inside the built container image.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the block completed.

image_ref.description: Fully-qualified image reference that was tested (registry/name@sha256:...).

command.description: The validation command(s) that were executed inside the container.

shell.description: Shell used as entrypoint (e.g. /bin/sh). Empty string means image default entrypoint.

exit_code.description: Exit code returned by the validation command. 0 = passed.

output.description: Captured stdout and stderr from the validation command (truncated at 50000 chars).
